meta.title: Property Tax Notice Checker
meta.description: Check your Grundsteuer (property tax) notice in minutes – free, step by step.

common.tagline: Your property tax notice, checked in minutes.

home.heroTitle: Can't understand your property tax notice?
home.heroSubtitle: The Property Tax Notice Checker recalculates your notice step by step – free and without specialist knowledge.
home.benefit1Text: Federal model, Bavaria, Baden-Württemberg and Hamburg – the app detects your model automatically.
home.benefit2Text: Every calculation step is shown with formula and intermediate result. No black box.
home.benefit3Text: If a discrepancy is found, the app generates a customisable objection draft – recommended: have it reviewed by a lawyer before submitting.
home.deadlineText: The objection period is only 1 month after the notice is issued (§ 355 AO). When does your deadline expire?
home.freeNotice: Version 1 is completely free – all features, no account required.

result.disclaimer: The check result is based on your inputs. If you are uncertain about any input values, we recommend consulting a tax advisor.

objection.legalDisclaimer: This letter is a template based on your inputs. It does not constitute legal advice. For complex cases or uncertainties, we recommend consulting a tax advisor or lawyer.

auth.confirmationSent: Confirmation email sent. Please check your inbox.
